creator: olce@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to feh from comment #33)

> PPS: So far, the new DRM seems to work well.

Great!

I'm tempted to close this PR, but ideally would prefer some additional input from Vlad and Tomek before doing so (please install 14.1, self-compile the graphics/drm-61-kmod port, test and report success or failure).  So, AFAIC, I'll leave it opened for a short while.  We can always re-open it as necessary anyway.
